results.name: TAY LOR
results.bio: An abnormal thinker✨ || Ghost writer || DeFi Researcher || Creator on @CoinMarketCap
results.text:
Do you know why most top crypto “chads” say web3 gives you freedom?

Web3 doesn’t follow traditional hiring logic.

– No recruiter will ask about your GPA.
– No hiring manager is waiting for your CV in their inbox.

➩ The market asks: what have you done, and where can I see it?

– Written work (threads, research, analyses)
– Explorations (tools, protocols, ecosystems)
– Contributions (projects, communities, open source)

Your work is your résumé. 
Your ability to contribute publicly is your tick
